name: Mandelbrot (Almond Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar together until thick.
2. Add the oil, vanilla extract, flour, baking powder, and chopped almonds to the egg mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled and floured 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan, spreading it evenly to cover the bottom of the pan.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon over the top of the batter.
5. Add another layer of batter and sprinkle with additional cinnamon. Repeat until all the batter and cinnamon are used.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
8. Cut into 1/2-inch slices when ready to serve. Place each slice on a lightly oiled baking sheet and toast in a preheated oven at 400°F for 5 to 6 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
